; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-22T18:57:00Z
;
; Requires: https://github.com/rmitchellscott/rm-librarian
;           https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions/xovi-message-broker
;           https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions/qt-command-executor

AFFECT [[13984630014232179591]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.CommandExecutor [[180922.180921]]

    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&6503679477&~ filterAnnotated: ~&214625660372&~
            property ~&197102514&~ annotatedPages: ({})
            property ~&7083178290016&~ _annotatedBuf: ""

            AsyncCommandExecutor {
                ~&5972374&~: _annotatedScanner
                command: "sh"
                onStdOutAvailable: (output) => { ~&6504254477&~._annotatedBuf += output + "\n"; }
                ~&16256495616891858321&~: {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&233743626668842&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&197088457&~ = {};
                    ~&197102514&~ raw = ~&6504254477&~._annotatedBuf.~&214641616085&~("\n");
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ = 0; ~&180980&~ < raw.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180980&~++) {
                        ~&197102514&~ pid = raw[~&180980&~].~&6504329413&~();
                        ~&5972376&~ (pid && pid.~&233731717342038&~("ERROR:") !== 0) ~&197088457&~[pid] = ~&6504329801&~;
                    }
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = {};
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~) {
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&254543134818768527&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&197088457&~[~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&254533375641282938&~(~&180978&~)]) ~&7083121414760&~[~&180978&~] = ~&6504329801&~;
                        }
                    }
                    ~&6504254477&~.annotatedPages = ~&7083121414760&~;
                }
            }

            function _scanAnnotatedPages() {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7712934851008712&~ || _annotatedScanner.~&233743626668842&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                _annotatedBuf = "";
                _annotatedScanner.arguments = ["-c", "echo '>egetContentPages:" + ~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~ + "' > /run/xovi-mb; cat /run/xovi-mb-out"];
                _annotatedScanner.startCommand();
            }

            ~&13184053911240945935&~: {
                annotatedPages = ({});
                filterAnnotated = ~&214625660372&~;
            }
        }

        REBUILD [[13733777459642361598]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&15212200997754082097&~.~&6503888195&~(); }
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&233748328658231&~ && ~&7712934851008712&~) {
                    _scanAnnotatedPages();
                }
            }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[214634455770]]
            LOCATE AFTER ALL
            INSERT {
                .~&7082656280847&~(function(~&180978&~) {
                    ~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180978&~ === ~&6504254477&~.~&477346483278306569&~
                            && ~&6504254477&~.~&15793094956877902211&~
                            && ~&7083223278816&~ ~&6504254477&~.~&15793094956877902211&~.~&10649546070979613506&~ === ~&"7713028246101167&~)
                        ~&7083121450889&~ !~&6504254477&~.~&15793094956877902211&~.~&10649546070979613506&~();
                    ~&7083121450889&~ !!~&6504254477&~.annotatedPages[~&180978&~];
                })
            }
        END REBUILD

        TRAVERSE [[254501108490678590]]#[[3012200093845240877]]
            LOCATE AFTER [[8398116566483627918]]#[[12788589299978607238]]
            INSERT {
                ~&8398116566483627918&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: filterAnnotatedButton
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&12788589299978607238&~.~&214640173127&~
                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                        ~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated = !~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated;
                    }
                    ~&233748328658231&~: !~&6504254477&~.~&254547531013851079&~ && !!~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&7713012671454059&~ !== ~&7711571060833448&~.~&7711997891205770&~
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771932550&~
                    ~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("Annotated")
                    ~&7713748390489352&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&7081723389952&~
                    ~&7713147376549066&~: ~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated
                    ~&8399273526924993769&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated ? ~&10508057930134225032&~ : ~&"503220030291830651&~
                    ~&214646099849&~: ~&12921149980962105220&~ + ~&233740248806464&~
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&8399743405844438450&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&13257341367876254&~
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
